.canvas-control-item.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.canvas-node-content.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.canvas-path-label.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(16, 16, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgba(16, 16, 16, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.markdown-embed.background: rgba(16, 16, 16, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.metadata-container.background: rgba(16, 16, 16, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(150, 166, 200, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.search-input-container.global-search-in.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.search-result-file-matched-text.background: rgba(255, 221, 51, 0.22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(16, 16, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar-item.font-family: "JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", "Cascadia Code", Iosevka, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace

.view-content.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf.mod-active.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-tab-header-container.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(40, 40, 40, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--font-monospace:
"JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", "Cascadia Code", "Iosevka",
    ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo,
    Consolas, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace
body.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.--ec-codeFontFml:
"JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", "Cascadia Code", "Iosevka",
    ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo,
    Consolas, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace
code.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(16, 16, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(16, 16, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

figcaption.--ec-codeFontFml:
"JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", "Cascadia Code", "Iosevka",

    Consolas, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace

figure.--ec-codeFontFml:
"JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", "Cascadia Code", "Iosevka",
    ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo,
    Consolas, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(150, 166, 200) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(16, 16, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(255, 221, 51, 0.22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.--ec-codeFontFml:
"JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", "Cascadia Code", "Iosevka",
    ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo,
    Consolas, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace
pre.background: rgb(16, 16, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre:has(> code.language-mermaid).background: rgb(16, 16, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead th.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
